headline: Pentagon Magnet Rules Recast Northrop Grumman Radar And Space Outlook
summary: The Pentagon is rolling out new supply chain rules that restrict the use of Chinese-origin rare earth magnets in U.S. defense programs. NYSE:NOC, a key supplier of defense radar and space situational awareness systems, is expected to shift sourcing to domestic and North American magnet-grade rare earth producers. At the same time, Northrop Grumman is progressing on large, long horizon programs such as the Deep Space Advanced Radar Capability, which supports global space monitoring. For you...
